description: Verify --symlinks flag creates CLAUDE.md and GEMINI.md symlinks at every AGENTS.md level for cross-agent compatibility

assertions.assertion: Root CLAUDE.md symlink points to AGENTS.md
assertions.rationale: Claude Code auto-loads root CLAUDE.md at session start

assertions.assertion: Root GEMINI.md symlink points to AGENTS.md
assertions.rationale: Gemini CLI auto-loads root GEMINI.md at session start

assertions.assertion: Every subdirectory AGENTS.md has a matching CLAUDE.md symlink
assertions.check: find $PROJECT -name AGENTS.md -not -path '*/.git/*' | while read f; do dir=$(dirname "$f"); test -L "$dir/CLAUDE.md" || echo "MISSING: $dir/CLAUDE.md"; done
assertions.rationale: Claude Code loads subdirectory CLAUDE.md on demand when working in that directory. Without symlinks, subdirectory AGENTS.md is never loaded.

assertions.assertion: Every subdirectory AGENTS.md has a matching GEMINI.md symlink
assertions.check: find $PROJECT -name AGENTS.md -not -path '*/.git/*' | while read f; do dir=$(dirname "$f"); test -L "$dir/GEMINI.md" || echo "MISSING: $dir/GEMINI.md"; done
assertions.rationale: Gemini CLI loads subdirectory GEMINI.md hierarchically

assertions.assertion: All symlinks are relative (portable across machines)
assertions.check: find $PROJECT \( -name CLAUDE.md -o -name GEMINI.md \) -type l | while read f; do target=$(readlink "$f"); echo "$f -> $target"; [[ "$target" != /* ]] || echo "ABSOLUTE: $f"; done
assertions.rationale: Absolute symlinks break when the repo is cloned to a different path

assertions.assertion: Root AGENTS.md contains 'MUST read' instruction for scoped files
assertions.rationale: Fallback for agents without on-demand loading — explicit instruction to read subdirectory files
Symlinks must be committed to git for all contributors to benefit

assertions.assertion: --symlinks does not overwrite existing non-symlink CLAUDE.md
assertions.check: Create a real CLAUDE.md file, run --symlinks, verify it was NOT replaced (unless --force)
assertions.rationale: Safety: don't destroy user's custom CLAUDE.md with import directives or overrides

notes: These evals test the generation output. Testing whether agents actually load the files requires live agent runtimes (Claude Code subagents, Gemini CLI, etc.) which is outside the scope of static evals. See references/ai-tool-compatibility.md for verified loading behavior from March 2026 testing.
